HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[persistence] Walking the current identity through Azure-native persistence surfaces one service at a time.
ho-azure persistence

╭─────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ surface             │ summary                                                                                                                                    │
├─────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ app-service         │ Review App Service for deployment path, configuration power, code replacement, and reachable re-entry posture.                             │
│ automation          │ Review Azure Automation for reusable code, execution context, and trigger paths.                                                           │
│ azure-ml            │ Review Azure ML for reusable compute, job, schedule, endpoint, and identity paths.                                                         │
│ container-apps-jobs │ Review Container Apps Jobs for stored job definitions, trigger mode, container image, execution settings, and identity-backed rerun paths. │
│ functions           │ Review Function Apps for reusable code, identity, and trigger paths.                                                                       │
│ logic-apps          │ Review Logic Apps for reusable workflow and trigger paths.                                                                                 │
│ vm-extensions       │ Review VM Extensions for Azure-side extension attachment, script or command source, settings posture, VM agent delivery, and rerun paths.  │
│ webjobs             │ Review App Service WebJobs for reusable background code, mode, inherited app context, and rerun paths.                                     │
╰─────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 8 persistence surfaces are available; start with the service that best matches your current question.
